message:
feat: Add OpenAI-compatible API endpoints for drop-in replacement

When OpenAI/Anthropic credits run out, users can now just change
base_url to point to Zell and keep their existing code working.

Endpoints added:
- POST /v1/chat/completions (with SSE streaming)
- POST /v1/completions (legacy, with streaming)
- GET /v1/models
- POST /v1/embeddings (stub, returns 501)

Features:
- Full streaming support with OpenAI SSE format (data: prefix, [DONE])
- OpenAI-compatible error format
- Exact response JSON structure matching OpenAI

Usage:
  client = OpenAI(base_url="http://localhost:11434/v1")
